name: NIST AI RMF: MANAGE — Incident Response
description: AI incidents and negative impacts are responded to, recovered from, and communicated.
rationale: NIST AI RMF MANAGE 4: mechanisms are in place to respond to, recover from, and communicate about incidents and negative impacts.

examples.fails: the required risk-management step is absent

source: NIST AI Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0), NIST AI 100-1, 26 Jan 2023 — voluntary framework organised around GOVERN, MAP, MEASURE, MANAGE. https://www.nist.gov/itl/ai-risk-management-framework
